description: A survey of the nature of point defects, how these defects are produced, how the defects migrate and cluster, and what effects point defects and defect clusters have on the physical and mechanical properties of metals.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: M S & E 350or351, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: M S & E 350or351, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
